ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-19-2024 Continued To Nov-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Coward appeared by zoom for Erin Bennett (petitioner).

The court stated that it read Mr. Cowan's response, that it is ordering sanctions against him in the amount of $250.00 payable within 10-days, and questions why he did not file an inventory and appraisal, and why he didn't seek court approval prior to giving the assets to his client. Mr. Cowan stated that this is an ancillary probate, that the main probate in Colorado was completed and that there is one beneficiary who is the petitioner. Mr. Cowan also stated that the property was sold, that the sale proceeds were distributed to the petitioner and that there are no creditors. The court informed Mr. Cowan that he needs to file an inventory and appraisal, that he can file a petition for final distribution, that his client can waive an accounting and that it should be pretty straight forward. Status on close of estate is continued to November 18, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mr. Cowan is unable to file a petition for final distribution by then, he must file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. The order to appear/order to show cause is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Magdaleno. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Aug-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Continued To Aug-12-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and an Order to Show Cause Re Sanctions will be issued to the Attorney John H. Coward to appear on August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is continued to August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
